items.definition_en: A food container is an item used to store food.
items.example_en: She put the leftover soup in a food container.

items.definition_en: A lunch box is a small container for carrying meals.
items.example_en: He takes his sandwich to school in a lunch box.

items.definition_en: A bread box is a box for keeping bread fresh.
items.example_en: The rolls stay soft in the bread box.

items.definition_en: A cookie jar is a jar used to store cookies.
items.example_en: There are chocolate chips in the cookie jar.

items.definition_en: A storage bin is a large box for storing things.
items.example_en: They keep onions in a storage bin under the sink.

items.definition_en: A spice jar is a small container for spices.
items.example_en: She filled the spice jar with cinnamon.

items.definition_en: A plastic tub is a round plastic container.
items.example_en: Yogurt comes in a plastic tub.

items.definition_en: A glass jar is a clear container usually with a lid.
items.example_en: She stored honey in a glass jar.

items.definition_en: A canister is a container for holding dry food.
items.example_en: Coffee beans are kept in a canister.

items.definition_en: Tupperware is a brand name for a plastic food container.
items.example_en: She fills her tupperware with salad for lunch.

items.definition_en: A pantry box is a container for storing pantry items.
items.example_en: He organizes rice and beans in a pantry box.

items.definition_en: An ice cube tray is a container for making ice cubes.
items.example_en: She filled the ice cube tray with water.

items.definition_en: A milk jug is a container used to store milk.
items.example_en: He poured milk from the milk jug.

items.definition_en: A bottle is a container with a narrow neck for liquids.
items.example_en: She opened a bottle of water.

items.definition_en: A vacuum jar is a jar sealed to keep air out.
items.example_en: They store jam in a vacuum jar.

items.definition_en: A lunch bag is a bag for carrying food to eat later.
items.example_en: He takes his sandwich in a lunch bag.

items.definition_en: An egg carton is a container for holding eggs.
items.example_en: The eggs are stored in an egg carton.

items.definition_en: A storage basket is a basket for keeping kitchen items.
items.example_en: She keeps snacks in a storage basket.

items.definition_en: A tin is a metal container for food or treats.
items.example_en: She saves cookies in a tin.

items.definition_en: A pitcher is a large container for pouring drinks.
items.example_en: The pitcher held cold lemonade.
